svg.title: Hybrid Azure AD Join and Autopilot provisioning architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full trust chain from on-prem Active Directory through Entra Connect sync, Entra ID, Autopilot deployment service, device OOBE, hybrid join and Intune enrollment, dynamic groups, ending in three parallel outcomes: app assignment, configuration policies, and conditional access.

g.text: User signs in with Entra ID
Device joins AD and Entra ID
